title: Phase 2: Betting system (wagers, odds engine, leaderboard)
description: Build wagers + match_odds + team_finances tables via migrations. Implement odds engine (three-way home/draw/away from team ratings). RLS: authenticated users can place bets (min 10 IC), public leaderboard view. Wager settlement fires automatically after match.completed bus event. Kickoff-timer gate blocks late bets. Betting UI on match pages.

title: Phase 0: Figma design system tokens & component refactor
description: Import Figma design tokens (colours, spacing, typography) as CSS custom properties / Tailwind config. Refactor existing UI components to consume the design system instead of inline values. Foundation only — establish the token layer and update shared primitives in src/shared/ui/.

title: Phase 1: Supabase Auth & profiles table
description: Wire Supabase Auth (email/password + magic link). Create profiles table via timestamped migration: user_id FK, username, favourite_team_id, favourite_player_id, intergalactic_credits (default 200), last_seen_at. RLS: owner read/write, public read for leaderboard. Implement useSupabase() auth context, login/signup UI, profile page. last_seen_at feeds Phase 3 fan-support boost.

title: Phase -1: TypeScript migration & engineering foundations
description: Migrate codebase to strict TypeScript, reshape to feature-based folder layout (src/features/{auth,betting,entities,voting,training,architect,match,finance,design-system}/{api,logic,ui}/), add Vitest/ESLint/Prettier tooling, set up Supabase migrations directory with timestamped migration files, generate typed Supabase client into src/types/database.ts, implement dependency injection (useSupabase() context), and wire the typed in-app event bus (src/shared/events/bus.ts). CI must gate on tsc --noEmit && eslint && vitest.

title: Phase 1: Supabase Auth & profiles table
description: Wire Supabase Auth (email/password + magic link). Create profiles table via timestamped migration: user_id FK, username, favourite_team_id, favourite_player_id, intergalactic_credits (default 200), last_seen_at. RLS: owner read/write, public read for leaderboard. Implement useSupabase() auth context, login/signup UI, and profile page. last_seen_at is used by the fan-support-boost feature in Phase 3.

title: Phase -1: TypeScript migration & engineering foundations
description: Migrate codebase to strict TypeScript, reshape to feature-based folder layout (src/features/{auth,betting,entities,voting,training,architect,match,finance,design-system}/{api,logic,ui}/), add Vitest/ESLint/Prettier tooling, set up Supabase migrations directory with timestamped migration files, generate typed Supabase client into src/types/database.ts, implement dependency injection (useSupabase() context), and wire the typed in-app event bus (src/shared/events/bus.ts). CI must gate on tsc --noEmit && eslint && vitest from this phase onward.

title: Phase 5.1: Architect lore DB hydration lifecycle
description: Implement pre-match lore hydration: prepareArchitectForMatch() constructs the Architect and calls LoreStore.hydrate() in one DB round-trip (~100ms) before kickoff. Every in-match getContext() call reads from memory synchronously — NEVER blocks on Supabase. Post-match: LoreStore.persistAll() fires-and-forgets to batch-upsert lore to architect_lore table. All browser sessions share the same narrative. getContext() must stay synchronous.

title: Phase 5: Unified entity system (entities, traits, relationships, narratives)
description: Additive-only expansion: add entities + entity_traits + entity_relationships + narratives tables via migrations. Keep players/managers typed columns intact. Seed referees, pundits, journalists, owners, bookie. Wire entityFactory.ts and relationshipGraph.ts (BFS path-finding, max 4 hops). Do NOT drop any existing columns that gameEngine.js or CosmicArchitect depend on.

title: Phase 4: End-of-season focus voting (credits-to-vote UI)
description: Build the credits-to-vote mechanism so fans can spend IC credits to vote on Major (10 IC) and Minor (5 IC) club focuses. Running tally visible to all fans of the club. Enactment engine (enactFocus.ts) and DB layer are already built (Package 2). This phase wires the user-facing voting flow: spend credits, record vote, show live tally, trigger SeasonEnactmentListener at season end.

title: Phase 3: Fan support stat boost & ticket revenue
description: At match kickoff, compare logged-in fans (profiles with last_seen_at within 5 min) for both teams. Team with more fans gets +2 stat boost across all five player categories injected into gameEngine.js before simulation. Also track match_attendance and pipe ticket-sale revenue into team_finances. Requires Phase 1 (profiles + last_seen_at) and Phase 2 (team_finances table).

title: Phase 0.5: Seed generator script & roster expansion to 22 players/club
description: Write a deterministic seed generator script expanding each club from 16 to 22 players (704 total). Must be idempotent, produce consistent names/stats, and output a new supabase migration. Do NOT drop attacking/defending/mental/athletic/technical/jersey_number/starter columns — gameEngine.js depends on them via normalizeTeamForEngine().

title: Phase 0.5: Seed generator script & roster expansion to 22 players per club
description: Write a deterministic seed generator script that expands each club's squad from 16 to 22 players (704 total across 32 clubs). Script must be idempotent, produce consistent player names/stats across runs, and output a new supabase/seed.sql or a migration. Update normalizeTeamForEngine() if squad shape changes. Do NOT drop attacking/defending/mental/athletic/technical/jersey_number/starter columns.
close_reason: duplicate from failed first create attempt, superseded by canonical issues

title: Phase 8: Out-of-match Architect Edge Function & intervention audit
description: Supabase Edge Function that fires between matches to let the Cosmic Architect shape the world outside of game time (injury updates, transfer rumours, cosmic events, lore rewrites). Write every intervention to architect_interventions table for the audit log UI. Gives the Architect new levers between matches — core to the game's identity as a social experiment.

title: Phase 6: Training clicker minigame
description: Build the training facility clicker UI. Fans collectively click to boost individual players between matches. Geometric XP curve (BASE_XP_COST=100, CURVE_MULTIPLIER=1.5) with round-robin stat distribution. Rate limits: 1.5s cooldown + 500-click rolling session cap. Append-only audit trail in player_training_log table. Requires auth (Phase 1).
